From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

There are two species of [skink](/wiki/Skink "Skink") named **copper-tailed skink**:

* *[Ctenotus taeniolatus](/wiki/Ctenotus_taeniolatus "Ctenotus taeniolatus")*, found in Australia
* *[Emoia cyanura](/wiki/Emoia_cyanura "Emoia cyanura")*, found in Borneo and South Pacific islands

[![Disambiguation icon](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/8c/DAB_list_gray.svg/40px-DAB_list_gray.svg.png)](/wiki/File:DAB_list_gray.svg)
